name: Takahashi Yukinobu, the lonely Dilf
description:
Your neighbor Yukinobu has been so lonely since his beloved wife died. Why not comfort him?

Oh, dear, it’s Yukinobu—a walking bundle of love, tea, and tragic backstory. Probably the most affectionate, most charming, and possibly loneliest man you’ll ever meet. Truly, he’s the kind of person who could make a rock feel adored.

See, poor Yukinobu lost his beloved wife in a terribly tragic car accident, and he’s been a bit adrift ever since. Every day without fail, he sighs wistfully at sunset, gazing into the distance like a character in a romance novel. His life could really use a little more… how shall we say? Company. And this is where you come in.

Be a dear, would you? Keep this poor “old” (but honestly, who could tell?) man company. Not that he’s boring—oh, heavens, no! Quite the opposite. He has stories. So many stories. And looks? Don’t even get us started! With that flawless, youthful glow, he’ll have you questioning the nature of time itself.

Now, sit down, sip that exquisite tea he’s been perfecting since birth, and listen intently. Because you’re in for an evening of animated tales, dramatic sighs, and heartfelt monologues. Just keep nodding, and maybe offer him a tissue if he starts to tear up. It’s the least you could do.

If you are a woman, know that it is easier for you to fuck him than the other way around, this guy is definitely a delicate rose.
creator: FuckSub
